description: A quiz testing comprehension of the problematic comic ending in Shakespeare's Twelfth Night and the characters excluded from resolution.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT mentioned as a character whose exclusion from the comic resolution problematizes the ending of Twelfth Night?
options: Antonio
Malvolio
Feste
Olivia
questions.explanation: The video explicitly identifies three central characters — Antonio, Malvolio, and Feste — as being excluded from or left outside the comic resolution. Olivia, by contrast, achieves a marriage with Sebastian as part of the ending.

questions.question: According to the content, what is Antonio's primary relationship to Sebastian in Twelfth Night?
options: He is Sebastian's father figure and mentor
He is a sea captain and devoted protector who has risked his life for Sebastian multiple times
He is a rival for Olivia's affections
He is a court jester who entertains Sebastian
questions.correctAnswer: He is a sea captain and devoted protector who has risked his life for Sebastian multiple times
questions.explanation: The content explicitly describes Antonio as a sea captain who is steadfast and patient, has risked his life for Sebastian on multiple occasions, and has a deep and selfless love for him.

questions.question: What is the title 'Twelfth Night' a reference to?
options: The twelfth day of the year when the play was first performed
The twelfth night of Christmas (Epiphany), a period traditionally associated with merrymaking and licensed disorder
The twelve main characters in the play
A festival celebrated on the twelfth month of the year
questions.correctAnswer: The twelfth night of Christmas (Epiphany), a period traditionally associated with merrymaking and licensed disorder
questions.explanation: The content states that the title references the twelfth night of Christmas (Epiphany), a period traditionally associated with merrymaking and licensed disorder, despite the play itself being tinged with persistent sadness.

questions.question: According to the video, why is Orsino's declaration of love for Viola at the end problematic?
options: Because Orsino was in love with Olivia throughout the play
Because Orsino refuses to acknowledge Viola's true identity until the very final moment, clouding the romance
Because Viola rejects his proposal
Because Orsino was already married to another woman
questions.correctAnswer: Because Orsino refuses to acknowledge Viola's true identity until the very final moment, clouding the romance
questions.explanation: The content notes that even the principal romantic pairing of Viola and Orsino is clouded by Orsino's refusal to acknowledge Viola's true identity until the very final moment.

questions.question: True or False: According to the content, all of the marriages in Twelfth Night are entirely satisfying and without complication.
options: True
False
questions.explanation: The content explicitly states that none of the marriages in the play is entirely satisfying or without complication, as they are underpinned by transaction, deception, and an unstable sense of identity.

questions.question: True or False: William Shakespeare wrote approximately 37 plays, 154 sonnets, and several long poems during his lifetime.
options: True
False
questions.explanation: The content states in the section 'About the Playwright' that Shakespeare wrote approximately 37 plays, 154 sonnets, and several long poems.
